name: Spanish Saffron Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with pepper.
2. Place in a large Dutch oven coated with cooking spray.
3. Cook over medium heat until browned.
4. Wipe pan drippings from the Dutch oven with a paper towel.
5. Coat Dutch oven again with Pam; place over medium-high heat until hot.
6. Add onion, garlic, and mushrooms; sauté until tender.
7. Add chicken, 1 cup water, and paprika, bouillon powder, and saffron threads.
8. Bring to a boil.
9. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 25 minutes until chicken is tender.
10. Remove chicken and set aside.
11. Add peas, olives, and skim milk to the Dutch oven.
12. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
13. Combine cornstarch and 2 tablespoons water; add to vegetable mixture.
14. Bring to a boil.
15. Reduce heat; cook, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
16. To serve, place rice on a serving platter.
17. Arrange chicken over rice; top with vegetable mixture.
